creator: johans@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->suspended

It is not clear if this problem still occurs. Since it was opened, 
coq, the compiler and the preprocessor have been updated in ports. 
Several people have tried to reproduce this problem, but all can 
build it fine. Submitter seems to have stopped responding to email. 

Suspend it for now, until somebody confirms the problem. 
Antoly: please try building coq again with up-to-date tools.
